{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032318232603F6A1151D8007C8E3E5"}"},"total":28477},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6804704479175606286","common":{"comment_type":2,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书作者写的很好，剧情跌宕起伏，过程精彩绝伦。每个人物描写刻画都非常好！在一些人物上写的很正能量！真希望到这本书的结局时能是一个圆满美好的大结局，真心希望九皇子和郡主能成为大顺的皇上和皇后，真心希望他们能白头到老永远恩爱。作者将每个人物描写的事无巨细，内容惊险刺激，无时无刻调动人心，赞！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1584172481,"group_id":"6551664903621446670","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"静好如初，安之若素。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5glMRmcBJX50QJA4xjatejwJrqw83XOCjkL++EZt7jU","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/cc3e6673c36848e3b4abb2994dcaeda5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795140&x-signature=8B3bSJ%2FIbN5eGr5AKlwBRn8MFCo%3D","user_id":"2348172954314030","user_name":"幽兰风荷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2348172954314030","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6551664903621446670","book_info":{"abstract":"21世纪中西医双料圣手、陆战部队特级医官凤羽珩，duang 的一声穿越成大顺朝凤家嫡女。
奈何爹爹不亲，祖母不爱，娘亲懦弱，弟弟年幼，姐妹一个比一个狠辣，穿越重生，绝不能再像原主那般窝囊！
跟我斗？老子一鞭子抽得你满地找牙！
跟我打？老子一手术刀把你千刀万剐！
玩阴的？老子一针下去扎你个半身不遂！
杀我灭口？一爪子挠开你的心窝！
人人可欺的柔弱女子摇身一变成为大顺朝的香饽饽，跟皇帝开医院，揽尽天下人心天下财，但是那个见鬼皇子的婚约是怎么回事儿？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/1124f3c28d3631e0efaf363422384e67","author":"杨十六","author_id":"","book_id":"6551664903621446670","book_name":"神医嫡女","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":246,"name":"宫斗宅斗","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=246&name=宫斗宅斗&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":88,"name":"嫡女","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=88&name=嫡女&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":247,"name":"医术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247&name=医术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6551665297152016910","read_count":"50338","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4040857"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1258","tags":"宫斗宅斗,医术,古代言情,穿越,空间,嫡女,1v1,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/fe910000988e255abaaf~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779445406&x-signature=W7i%2FRoY8Sg2uXYXT2GLBCUSACho%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"285505809030868","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"lo
